name: Ubiquiti WaveFiber ONU
title: Ubiquiti WaveFiber ONU
description: The Ubiquiti WaveFiber ONU is a high-performance optical network unit (ONU) designed for deployment in GPON fiber networks, offering robust, high-speed internet access to residential and commercial users. Operating in compliance with the ITU-T G.984 GPON standard, the WaveFiber ONU supports downstream speeds of up to 2.488 Gbps and upstream speeds of up to 1.244 Gbps, ensuring seamless video streaming, cloud applications, and low-latency online gaming. The device features one GPON SC/APC fiber port and one 1G RJ45 Ethernet LAN port, enabling direct connection to customer devices or routers. Whether you're rolling out fiber in a new development or upgrading legacy networks, the WaveFiber ONU fits seamlessly into your GPON architecture.

detailed_description.heading: High-Speed Fiber Access
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti WaveFiber ONU is a high-performance optical network unit (ONU) designed for deployment in GPON fiber networks, offering robust, high-speed internet access to residential and commercial users. Operating in compliance with the ITU-T G.984 GPON standard, the WaveFiber ONU supports downstream speeds of up to 2.488 Gbps and upstream speeds of up to 1.244 Gbps, ensuring seamless video streaming, cloud applications, and low-latency online gaming. The device features one GPON SC/APC fiber port and one 1G RJ45 Ethernet LAN port, enabling direct connection to customer devices or routers. Whether you're rolling out fiber in a new development or upgrading legacy networks, the WaveFiber ONU fits seamlessly into your GPON architecture.

detailed_description.heading: Compact and Efficient Design
detailed_description.text: Compact and efficient, this ONU delivers excellent performance with minimal power consumption (less than 3W typical), making it ideal for large-scale fiber rollouts. It integrates effortlessly with Ubiquiti’s Wave OLT systems and is a key component for scalable, cost-effective FTTH deployments. The Ubiquiti WaveFiber ONU is designed for long-term stability and scalability in next-generation fiber networks. With support for a 20 km maximum transmission distance (depending on optical budget and fiber type), it is well-suited for both urban and rural deployments. The ONU offers automatic laser shutdown in case of fiber disconnection to protect the optics and ensure network safety.

detailed_description.heading: Effortless Deployment
detailed_description.text: Engineered for easy installation and management, the WaveFiber ONU supports auto-discovery and remote provisioning via standard OMCI (ONT Management and Control Interface) protocols. It can be seamlessly integrated into existing GPON infrastructure, allowing ISPs to manage large fleets of ONUs efficiently. The unit is plug-and-play, with LED indicators for power, PON status, and LAN activity, providing instant status feedback. Compatible with the Ubiquiti UISP platform, it provides unified monitoring and management for streamlined network administration, customer diagnostics, and performance optimization, all from a single dashboard.

detailed_description.heading: Minimalist Form Factor
detailed_description.text: Measuring just a few centimeters in size, the ONU has a minimalist form factor that blends into any home or office environments. Its rugged design guarantees operation in temperatures ranging from -10°C to 45°C, ensuring consistent performance. The external 12V DC power adapter allows for flexible positioning, while wall-mount support makes installation clean and organized. For ISPs looking to extend high-speed fiber access quickly and efficiently, the WaveFiber ONU provides a cost-effective endpoint that balances performance, durability, and manageability.
